name: Sopa de puchero
description: /'Soup from puchero'/ The logical conclusion to every puchero, making soup from it.

ingredients: A few leaves of hierbahuerto (1 or 2 per person. also called hierbabuena or menta spicata, a soft variety of mint. Can replace with mint, but about half a leaf only.)

instructions: - Remove tomatoes but get the pulp from them by cutting in half and crushing with a fork. The skin should come out really easily after. Slightly break the pieces of meat with your hands. Add the oil
- Take to a simmer, correct for salt, add rice and count 20'
- Serve with a couple leaves of the herb of choice

culinary: Hierbahuerto is optional really, but quite traditional in the Canaries.
serving: Serve with a lot of bread on the side, and/or a side dish.
